Placeholder collection for a slide

Source: R/slide.R
SlidePlaceholders.Rd

Provides access to placeholder shapes on a slide. Supports indexed access by placeholder idx via [[, length(), and to_list().

Super classes

rpptx::ElementProxy -> rpptx::ParentedElementProxy -> SlidePlaceholders

Methods

Public methods

  • SlidePlaceholders$new()

  • SlidePlaceholders$get()

  • SlidePlaceholders$get_at()

  • SlidePlaceholders$to_list()

  • SlidePlaceholders$clone()

Usage

SlidePlaceholders$new(spTree, parent)

Method get()

Usage

SlidePlaceholders$get(idx)

Method get_at()

Usage

SlidePlaceholders$get_at(n)

Method to_list()

Usage

SlidePlaceholders$to_list()

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

SlidePlaceholders$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.
